element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Attack at standstill, while moving, while jumping, and lunging in midair
Foundation for traversal and combat movement
Fire, Water, Earth, Air - can be used individually or combined; water heals, combinations create buffs
All four elements can be combined simultaneously for enhanced effects
Food for health recovery, gear for offensive/defensive power increases
Pattern recognition and elemental magic application required
Environmental and logic-based puzzles interspersed with combat

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Green Row (overworld), plus towns within dungeon

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Manual exploration and charting; does not reveal items or townspeople locations
Distributed throughout dungeon levels; motivation for progression

element_introduction_order.element: Deep dungeon encounters (wizard guild, goblin town)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Complex areas with NPCs, advanced enemies, narrative developments

element_introduction_order.element: Demon Ramiah and Ragno Roke antagonists
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Final boss confrontation requiring full mastery of combat and magic

typical_tension_triggers: Unknown dungeon layout (fog of war via manual mapping)
Deeper dungeon descent (wizard guild, goblin town)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Exploration-driven with combat and puzzle punctuation; tension builds through dungeon depth progression and enemy density increase; relief provided by town sanctuaries and NPCs; isometric perspective creates constant spatial awareness demands

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Multiple towns and shops hidden within dungeon levels; NPC placement indicates secret/optional areas
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Graveyard stairwell entrance to dungeon; deeper levels contain entire civilizations (wizard guild, goblin town) suggesting hidden vertical pathways and secret chambers

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-paced introduction to sword combat, basic magic, and navigation of Green Row overworld and early dungeon floors
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Elemental magic combination mastery required; enemy density increases; dungeon layout becomes more complex; wizard guild and goblin town introduce narrative and spatial complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Full combat suite mastery (all four elements simultaneous, sword lunging, movement combos); complex dungeon navigation; boss pattern recognition; final confrontation with Ramiah requires all learned mechanics
notable_spikes: Early boss encounter (tests basic combat proficiency)
Final Ramiah boss battle (requires full elemental synergy)

notable_level_patterns.description: Multi-level vertical descent structure with NPCs and townspeople distributed across floors; each floor increases enemy density and introduces new spatial/mechanical challenges; floor transitions serve as natural narrative and mechanical progression gates
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early dungeon floors through wizard guild territory

notable_level_patterns.description: Sanctuary areas (Green Row overworld, towns within dungeon) provide shops, NPCs, narrative exposition, and relief from combat pressure; serve as waypoints for inventory management and healing
Isolated chambers where bosses serve as floor/narrative checkpoints; require application of learned combat techniques and often tie to main plot (Ragno Roke, Ramiah)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early floor boss, final Ramiah encounter

notable_level_patterns.description: Puzzles interspersed throughout dungeon requiring elemental magic combinations or environmental interaction; solve to unlock new pathways, rescue townspeople, or progress downward
